title: Synchronize published and candidate metadata digests
outOfScope: Changing release tags, release assets, source commits, or provider publication state.
Changing implementation behavior or historical Work Item evidence.

sources.reason: Canonical state currently contains metadata digests that fail its own consistency check.
Validator defines the exact byte-level digest relationship to repair and verify.
Published metadata whose current digest must be recorded.
Candidate metadata whose current digest must be recorded.
Final review detected the consistency failure after cleanup.

riskAssessment.reason: A deterministic metadata-only digest update restores the validator's declared invariant.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized uninterrupted completion; this is a required final consistency repair discovered by verification.

preReviewWarnings: Verify only the two exact metadata digests change and all release identity fields remain unchanged.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release-state.json metadataDigests.published equals the exact SHA-256 of release.json.
release-state.json metadataDigests.candidate equals the exact SHA-256 of next-release.json.
Release tag, source commit, evidence state, and publication metadata remain unchanged.
Release state consistency, governance checks, and full quality checks pass.
guidelines: Preserve release source identity and immutable tag evidence.
Do not claim publication success from local metadata alone.

intent.problem: The final main-branch verification found that release-state.json metadataDigests no longer match the current release.json and next-release.json bytes, so the canonical consistency gate fails despite a successful published release.
constraints: Change only the two derived metadata digest values.
Keep v0.5.34 publication and v0.5.35 candidate identity unchanged.
Record the repair through a dedicated Work Item, PR, merge, closure, and branch cleanup.
intent.rationale: Refreshing derived hashes restores the explicitly enforced invariant without changing release identity or provider evidence.

rawUserRequest: 继续循环到全部任务完整为止；如果最终复核发现一致性问题，继续修改并完成完整 PR、合并、关闭工单和分支清理流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Restore canonical release metadata digest consistency without changing release identity.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Both metadata digests match exact current file bytes.
Published tag and candidate identity remain unchanged after the repair.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
